name: YAGNI Principles
description: Enforces 'You Aren't Gonna Need It' discipline: build the smallest correct change, avoid speculative abstractions and future-proofing.

modes.name: Prompt
modes.description: Inserts a short YAGNI prompt block into the profile's SOUL.md (no external repo).

modes.name: Off
modes.description: Addon present but inactive; contributes nothing.

excluded_modes.ponytail: Modus A ('Ponytail', external repo coupling to DietrichGebert/ponytail) is intentionally NOT declared here. It is gated behind a separate CEO clarification (kanban task t_f321af09, OQ-1 Human Gate, unresolved) and is out of scope for FR-8's prompt+off delivery. Do not wire or implement it until that gate is resolved.
